w:r.w:t: A company wants to improve how internal support and service requests are handled.
NOT a giant enterprise platform, internal system.
Lite is a lightweight internal platform designed to centralize employee support requests and improve visibility, ownership, and resolution tracking across operational teams.

The system replaces fragmented communication channels such as email, chat messages, and informal follow-ups with a structured workflow that allows requests to move clearly from submission to completion.
Centralize all internal support requests into one system
Provide visibility into ticket progress and workload
Prepare the system for future scalability
As an employee, I want to submit a support ticket so that I can report issues easily.
As an employee, I want to track my ticket status so that I know progress updates.
As an employee, I want to receive notifications when my ticket changes status.
As a support agent, I want to view all assigned tickets so that I can manage my workload.
As a support agent, I want to update ticket statuses so that progress is visible.
As a support agent, I want to add comments to tickets so that communication remains centralized.
As a manager, I want to view team workload dashboards so that I can monitor performance.
As a manager, I want to identify overdue tickets so that bottlenecks can be resolved.
Users shall be able to create tickets
Tickets shall contain title, description, category, and priority
Users shall add comments to tickets
System is only for company employees
Initial usage is within a small-to-medium organization
Users primarily access through desktop browsers
Ticket flow remains simple in V1
